title: APIs for XML Handling
text: APIs for XML Handling You can implement your own XML handlers using the APIs provided by the UXMLREADER and UXMLWRITER components, and SAX callback operations. Related Links UXMLREADER UXMLREADER is an internal Uniface component that enables you to parse XML documents stored in files, fields, or variables. UXMLWRITER UXMLWRITER is an internal Uniface component that enables you to generate XML documents rather than having to code each character in the XML stream yourself. SAX Callback Operations SAX callback operations are APIs that can be implemented on a user-defined SAX event handler. They enable you to use the parser information to manipulate and analyze XML data, and handle any errors that may be encountered. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
